response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in building scalable, production-grade systems on the cloud. His most recent role directly aligns with the job's core responsibilities, involving AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol. While his dedicated experience in AI may not span the full 8 years requested, his deep technical skills, polyglot nature, and recent pivot into the exact domain make him a compelling candidate. An interview is recommended to explore the depth of his recent GenAI work and assess his customer-facing capabilities.
strengths: Current role at re:cinq directly involves building AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, a strong match for the position.
Extensive experience as a Staff/Senior engineer building robust, scalable systems with relevant technologies like TypeScript and AWS.
Demonstrates strong engineering principles (TDD, CI/CD) and initiative through founding a long-term open-source project and giving technical talks.
concerns: Lacks the specified 8+ years of experience building AI-specific solutions; his deep AI experience appears to be very recent.
Python, a primary language for AI/ML, is not listed as a core skill, though he is a polyglot.
Resume does not explicitly detail customer-facing technical leadership, a key aspect of a Forward Deployed Engineer role.
